title: Who decides what AI tells you? Campbell Brown, once Meta’s news chief, has thoughts
snippet: "The conversation is sort of happening in Silicon Valley around one thing, and a totally different conversation is happening among consumers."

title: Clio’s $500M milestone arrives just as Anthropic ups the ante
snippet: Legal tech startups, including Clio, which just hit $500 million in ARR, are seeing massive customer adoption.

title: Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents
snippet: Notion’s new developer platform lets teams connect AI agents, external data sources, and custom code directly into their workspace as the company pushes deeper into agentic productivity software.
